feature: DEC-18 amendment — currency type flip USD->MNT
requirement: Flip the normative DEC-18 currency-type declaration and doc-level 'all amounts USD' conventions across 01-05 to MNT (ISO 4217 numeric 496), with a transitional-exceptions clause for the still-held USD amounts. Fix 3 minor-units par literals the amount pass missed (2500->1000000). Vendor names and held amounts untouched; 06/00 deferred.
backlog: LEDGER (standing, needs a human controller): account/ledger_entry/transaction are structure-only. The posting logic, chart of accounts, entry_type/transaction_type enum values, balance derivation, and the hold formula are HELD on a corrected ledger design (NOT 06's defects). Highest-value next architecture piece and the one requiring a controller, not an LLM pass.

Migration (partially done T3): T3 added an OFFLINE metadata-DDL == migration _UP gate. A STRONGER variant still worth adding: `alembic revision --autogenerate` against real Postgres in CI must yield an empty diff (catches things offline DDL render can miss).
Payment rails: 56 ACH/FedNow/SEPA -> Banksuljee (RTGS >MNT 5m) / ACH+ / NETC. Threshold is Governor's-order config, not a literal.
Vendors: Stripe/Plaid/Lithic/Persona leaked into schema field names and error codes — removal is a requirements change.
KPI re-baselining: 100,000 members vs 78,608 sector total; AUM ~1.5x whole sector. Held with the KPI decision.
Rate model: DEC-48 12% base below 17.45% market; DEC-49 6% floor is the subsidised mortgage rate. Both inverted.
verify-docs.sh prose blind spot (04:829, 04:1087) + no context exclusion on n_snake_name.
'etsgiin ner' vs 'etsgiin_ner' spacing — decide canonical spelling.

/ready malformed DATABASE_URL edge (LOW, T2 review): a non-empty-but-garbage URL passes engine_configured() then create_engine() raises ArgumentError during dependency resolution -> 500 instead of 503. Operator-misconfig edge; harden when auth/real-deploy lands.

DEC-18 currency-type amendment (surfaced by currency-apply agents): multiple docs now state amounts in ₮ while the DEC-18 declaration + the doc-level 'all amounts USD' conventions (01:374/406, 02:11, 04:9/110/750) still say USD/ISO-4217 USD. Flipping DEC-18 to MNT/496 is a NORMATIVE currency-policy decision (01 §6 owns it) — a user/coordinator amendment, not an amount pass. Do after the amount applies land.

Currency residual (after the 20260724 apply, usd re-baselined to 131): re-denominate the remaining HELD sets once their gating decision lands — KPI cluster (needs KPI re-baselining), program-config caps DEC-65/63 (needs program budget), $88.20+$40 installment (needs rate model), 06 ledger amounts (needs controller ledger rewrite), persona incomes (income-basis task). Each is single-currency-per-scenario; apply ×1000 illustrative scale for consistency with 01-05.

tasks.title: Amend DEC-18 normative in 01
tasks.note: merged; R1 APPROVED; DEC-18->MNT normative + transitional clause
tasks.description: READ .softhouse/dec18-amendment-brief.md IN FULL first (canonical amended text + exact locations). SCOPE 01: the DEC-18 row (01:374), canonical-term row (01:406), and the '#All monetary values are USD' convention (01:98). This is THE normative amendment — include the transitional-exceptions clause verbatim from the brief. Flip currency-TYPE declarations USD->MNT (ISO 4217 numeric 496) per the brief's verbatim wording; do NOT re-migrate already-converted amounts, do NOT touch vendor names (Stripe) or held USD amounts. Whole-tögrög notation; integer minor units in literals (no float). Run .softhouse/verify-docs.sh (HARD stays 0). Handoff lists every declaration flipped + literal fixed + confirms no vendor/held-amount touched.

tasks.title: Review DEC-18 normative amendment
tasks.description: INDEPENDENT review of T1. Read .softhouse/dec18-amendment-brief.md, CLAUDE.md, the handoff .softhouse/handoff/20260724-dec18-amendment/T1.md, and `git diff main...<branch>` (three-dot). CHECK: (1) every currency-type USD->MNT/496 flip matches the brief's canonical wording; (2) the DEC-18 transitional-exceptions clause is present and correctly enumerates KPIs/round-ups/installment/program-caps (T1 only); (3) minor-units literals 2500->1000000 correct where in scope (04:776/781, 05:1084) — recompute 10,000₮×100=1,000,000; (4) NO vendor name (Stripe) changed; (5) NO held USD amount converted; (6) NO already-migrated ₮ amount altered; (7) notation/no-float; (8) scope: only the intended file(s)+handoff. Verdict APPROVED / MICRO-FIX(<=10 lines) / REJECTED. Recompute, don't trust the handoff.
